name: Tabs
purpose: Switch between sibling views such as company profile sections, dataset facets, or workspace modes.

structures.name: Underline Tabs
structures.notes: Primary navigation between content sections; active tab carries the brand underline.

structures.name: Segmented Control
structures.notes: Compact view toggle inside a muted track for 2-4 mutually exclusive options.

structures.name: Tabs with Count
structures.notes: Adds a trailing count badge for facets like sources or facts.

interactionNotes: Only the active tab uses foreground weight; inactive tabs stay muted.
Underline indicator should animate position, not opacity, for a precise technical feel.
